name: writhing_stalker.live_escape_side_zombie_retreat_mcw
description: Live local-evidence zombie-shadow row: player retreats south from north/front zombie pressure and the stalker shadow destination chooses a south/escape-side cutoff tile. This row deliberately does not claim overmap-interest footing.

steps.label: post_load_escape_side_zombie_retreat_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: vulnerable-midnight local-evidence stalker plus north/front zombie-pressure fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_midnight_before_escape_side_retreat
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected midnight before escape-side zombie-retreat window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local midnight before escape-side zombie-retreat window

steps.label: audit_saved_monsters_before_escape_side_retreat
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required local-evidence stalker plus north/front zombie-pressure footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved active_monsters proves stalker plus north/front ordinary zombies before live retreat window

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_escape_side_retreat
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live turn window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: retreat_south_from_north_zombie_pressure
steps.expected_visible_fact: player retreats south away from the north/front zombie pressure before the stalker cutoff window

steps.label: advance_escape_side_zombie_retreat_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window runs after the player retreat and selects a south/escape-side cutoff opposite the north zombie pressure

steps.label: audit_writhing_stalker_escape_side_retreat_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked local-evidence live_plan plus quiet_cutoff lines proving north zombie-pressure side maps to a south/escape-side cutoff tile
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves the actual live shadow-destination path chose the escape side from local evidence after retreat; overmap interest is explicitly not claimed

evidence_contract.claim: local-evidence-only north/front zombie pressure during player retreat feeds the live shadow-destination path and chooses a south/escape-side cutoff tile
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for writhing-stalker zombie-shadow live behavior
evidence_contract.scope_note: This live row deliberately does not prove overmap-interest footing; live_context currently leaves has_overmap_interest_footing false and still requires local evidence before response.
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state footing and a visible retreat input; persistent map mutation is not part of the product claim.
